stories.summary: Define core v4 types (Issue, Cycle, Workflow, StepDef, Phase, Artifact, Note, Checkpoint, ValidConfig, DaemonProtocol)
Define port interfaces (StoragePort, TransportPort, ProjectionPort, ExpressionEvaluatorPort, PackageResolverPort)
Implement PGLite storage adapter with schema, migrations, and JSONB query builders
Implement in-memory storage adapter (contract tests shared with PGLite)
Build expression parser (tokenizer + AST) and evaluator with context namespace resolution
Implement interactive expression functions (confirm, prompt, choose) with pause/resume semantics
Config validation with branded ValidConfig, extends chain resolution, and structured errors
DAG resolver: topological sort, parallel group detection, cycle detection from workflow step needs
XState v5 machine generator: workflow definition to state machine config at load time
Step evaluation against DB state via expressions (skip, block, done, needs resolution)
Atomic txNext(): orchestrate evaluate → machine → persist in single DB transaction
Issue CRUD: create, update, close, archive, list with recursive parent/child hierarchy
Deferrals: create sibling issues with traceability metadata and deferral notes
Issue workflow: assign workflow by type, advance independently via tx next without cycle
Cycle lifecycle: start, pull issues, close with retro + checkpoint generation
Checkpoint system: handoff/pickup context bridges between LLM sessions
Policy engine: expression-based deferral/decision/scope_change/issue_create policies with pause semantics
Daemon server: PGLite owner, request queue, dirty tracking, batched flush, recovery
Socket transport adapter with named pipe support on Windows
CLI: thin socket client with all commands (issue, cycle, next, step, write, read, note, config, status)
Agent response contract: AgentResponse shape with issue/cycle state, action types, human/JSON output
Projection adapter: DB to filesystem markdown rendering (open, active, closed, checkpoints, snapshot)
Skill/persona npm resolution: install, discover, manifest, 3-layer merge
Guided setup: conversational tx init flow with workflow templates and skill suggestions
Workflow migration: tx migrate with declarative rules and agent-aided structural changes
Build system: JSON schema generation for all types, SKILL.md update, commit templates
End-to-end lifecycle tests: full issue, cycle, deferral, checkpoint, and migration flows
